languages.text: "Они явно относятся к одному виду, Ваша Светлость. Напоминают железных мертвецов, исписанных гнусными ксеноглифами. Что до различий — твари из руин вооружены длинными когтями, в бою яростны, и, благослови нас Святой Трон, в докладах сказано, что эти мерзкие отродья срезают кожу с павших меровцев и обтягивают ею свои металлические тела. Те, кто им противостоит, безразличны к человеческой плоти, сражаются расчетливо и хладнокровно, издалека испепеляя врагов из громоздкого энергетического оружия".

traits.locale_text: "Они явно относятся к одному виду, Ваша Светлость. Напоминают железных мертвецов, исписанных гнусными ксеноглифами. Что до различий — твари из руин вооружены длинными когтями, в бою яростны, стремительны и, благослови нас Святой Трон, в докладах сказано, что эти мерзкие отродья срезают кожу с павших меровцев и обтягивают ею свои металлические тела. Те, кто им противостоит, безразличны к человеческой плоти, сражаются расчетливо и хладнокровно, издалека испепеляя врагов из громоздкого энергетического оружия".

languages.text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."
languages.original_text: "Они явно относятся к одному виду, Ваша Светлость. Напоминают железных мертвецов, исписанных гнусными ксеноглифами. Что до различий — твари из руин вооружены длинными когтями, в бою яростны, и, благослови нас Святой Трон, в докладах сказано, что эти мерзкие отродья срезают кожу с павших меровцев и обтягивают ею свои металлические тела. Те, кто им противостоит, безразличны к человеческой плоти, сражаются расчетливо и хладнокровно, издалека испепеляя врагов из громоздкого энергетического оружия".

traits.locale_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

"They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity and blinding speed, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

"Some of the xenos are those creatures that previously attacked Tsar-Cage. Then iron corpses appeared seemingly out of nowhere and began attacking them. But these new strangers do not drape themselves with human flesh and arm themselves with claws, instead they carry heavy hand-held energy weapons. Scouts have reported that both factions are marked with the same xenoglyphs, so we cannot say if this is a dispute over territory, or if the reason for their conflict is beyond human understanding."

"They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

"They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for the differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity and blinding speed, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports state that these abominable spawn flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculating precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

"They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity and blinding speed, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

languages.text: 「一部の異形生物は、以前ツァー・ケージを襲った生物たちです。そして鉄の死体たちが、まるでどこからともなく現れて、彼らを攻撃し始めました。しかし、この新しい異形生物たちは、人間を覆い被ったり、爪を武器にしたりするのではなく、重たい手持ちのエネルギー兵器を携えています。偵察隊の報告によると、両陣営は同じ異形文字が刻まれているので、これは領土の争いなのか、それとも人間では理解できない理由によるものなのかは断言できません」
languages.original_text: "Some of the xenos are those creatures that previously attacked Tsar-Cage. Then iron corpses appeared seemingly out of nowhere and began attacking them. But these new strangers do not drape themselves with human flesh and arm themselves with claws, instead they carry heavy hand-held energy weapons. Scouts have reported that both factions are marked with the same xenoglyphs, so we cannot say if this is a dispute over territory, or if the reason for their conflict is beyond human understanding."

traits.locale_text: 「一部の異形生物は、以前ツァー・ケージを襲った生物たちです。そして鉄の死体たちが、まるでどこからともなく現れて、彼らを攻撃し始めました。しかし、この新しい異形生物たちは、人間を覆い被ったり、爪を武器にしたりするのではなく、重たい手持ちのエネルギー兵器を携えています。偵察隊の報告によると、両陣営は同じ異形文字が刻まれているので、これは領土の争いなのか、それとも人間では理解できない理由によるものなのかは断言できません。」

languages.text: «Claramente son de la misma especie, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Parecen cadáveres de hierro cubiertos de xenoglifos espantosos. En cuanto a sus diferencias: las criaturas de las ruinas poseen garras largas, luchan con una ferocidad inaudita y, que el Trono nos proteja, según los informes, desuellan a los merovianos caídos y estiran sus pieles por encima. A sus oponentes les resulta indiferente la carne humana. Luchan con frialdad y precisión, incinerando a sus enemigos a distancia con voluminosas armas de energía».
languages.original_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

traits.locale_text: «Claramente son de la misma especie, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Parecen cadáveres de hierro cubiertos de xenoglifos espantosos. En cuanto a sus diferencias: las criaturas de las ruinas poseen garras largas, luchan con una ferocidad inaudita y, que el Trono nos proteja, según los informes, desuellan a los merovianos caídos y estiran sus pieles por encima. A sus oponentes les resulta indiferente la carne humana. Luchan con frialdad y precisión, incinerando a sus enemigos a distancia con voluminosas armas de energía».

languages.text: “它们显然属于同一物种，大人。这些异形看起来都像是钢铁死尸，浑身覆满亵渎的异形铭文。不同之处就在于：遗迹里的那些异形有长长的利爪，战斗时野蛮而狂暴。而且——愿黄金王座保佑——报告里提到，这些怪物会剥下阵亡梅罗夫士兵的皮肤，披到自己的金属躯体上。而跟它们交战的那些异形，则对人类血肉毫无兴趣，只会以冰冷精准的方式作战，用笨重的能量武器从远处将敌人烧成灰烬。”
languages.original_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

traits.locale_text: “它们显然属于同一物种，大人。这些异形看起来都像是钢铁死尸，浑身覆满亵渎的异形铭文。不同之处就在于：遗迹里的那些异形有长长的利爪，战斗时野蛮而狂暴。而且——愿黄金王座保佑——报告里提到，这些怪物会剥下阵亡梅罗夫士兵的皮肤，披到自己的金属躯体上。而跟它们交战的那些异形，则对人类血肉毫无兴趣，只会以冰冷精准的方式作战，用笨重的能量武器从远处将敌人烧成灰烬。”

languages.text: "Sie gehören eindeutig derselben Spezies an, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Sie sehen aus wie mit Xenoglyphen bedeckte eiserne Leichen. Es gibt aber auch Unterschiede. Die Kreaturen aus den Ruinen haben lange Klauen, kämpfen brutal und — der Heilige Thron stehe uns bei — den Berichten nach ziehen diese Abscheulichkeiten gefallenen Merovianern die Haut ab und bedecken damit ihre metallenen Leiber. Die anderen interessieren sich nicht für menschliches Fleisch. Sie kämpfen mit kalter, berechnender Präzision und setzen ihre Gegner aus sicherer Distanz mit unhandlichen Energiewaffen in Brand.
languages.original_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

Die Kreaturen aus den Ruinen haben lange Klauen, kämpfen brutal und — der Heilige Thron stehe uns bei — den Berichten nach ziehen diese Abscheulichkeiten gefallenen Merovianern die Haut ab und bedecken damit ihre metallenen Leiber. Die anderen interessieren sich nicht für menschliches Fleisch. Sie kämpfen mit kalter, berechnender Präzision und setzen ihre Gegner aus sicherer Distanz mit unhandlichen Energiewaffen in Brand.

languages.text: "Kesinlikle aynı türdenlermiş {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İğrenç zeno glifleriyle kaplı demir cesetlere benziyorlarmış. Farklılıklarına gelince... Harabelerden gelen yaratıkların uzun pençeleri varmış, vahşi bir acımasızlıkla savaşıyorlarmış. Raporlar, bu ucube yaratıkların düşen Merovluların derilerini yüzdüğünü ve onları kendi metal bedenlerinin üzerine gerdiğini iddia ediyor. Kutsal Taht bizi korusun. Onlara karşı koyanlar, insan etine karşı kayıtsız. Soğuk, hesaplanmış bir hassasiyetle savaşıyorlar. Düşmanlarını hantal enerji silahlarıyla uzaktan yakarak yok ediyorlar."
languages.original_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle aynı türdenlermiş {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İğrenç zeno glifleriyle kaplı demir cesetlere benziyorlarmış. Farklılıklarına gelince... Harabelerden gelen yaratıkların uzun pençeleri varmış, vahşi bir acımasızlıkla savaşıyorlarmış. Raporlar, bu ucube yaratıkların düşen Merovluların derilerini yüzdüğünü ve onları kendi metal bedenlerinin üzerine gerdiğini iddia ediyor. Kutsal Taht bizi korusun. Onlara karşı koyanlar, insan etine karşı kayıtsız. Soğuk, hesaplanmış bir hassasiyetle savaşıyorlar. Düşmanlarını hantal enerji silahlarıyla uzaktan yakarak yok ediyorlar."

languages.text: « Ils appartiennent clairement à la même espèce, Votre Seigneurie. Ils ressemblent à des cadavres de fer, couverts de glyphes ignobles. Quant à leurs différences, eh bien, les créatures des ruines possèdent de longues griffes et combattent avec une férocité sauvage. Par ailleurs, le saint Trône nous préserve, les rapports indiquent que ces abominations écorchent les Méroviens tombés au combat et se servent de leur peau comme d'habits pour leurs corps de métal. Les autres sont indifférents à la chair humaine et combattent avec une précision froidement calculée en incinérant leurs ennemis à distance, à l'aide d'armes énergétiques lourdes. »
languages.original_text: "They are clearly of the same species, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. They resemble iron corpses, covered in vile xenoglyphs. As for their differences: the creatures from the ruins possess long claws, fight with savage ferocity, and, may the Holy Throne preserve us, the reports claim these abominations flay the skin from fallen Merovians and stretch it over their own metal bodies. Those who oppose them are indifferent to human flesh. They fight with cold, calculated precision, incinerating their foes from a distance with cumbersome energy weaponry."
